_comment: Themed grouping for INDEX.md. Each member is a skill id of the form '<source>/<skill>' matching skills/<source>/<skill>/. build-index.mjs renders groups in this order, auto-extracts each skill's name/description from its SKILL.md YAML frontmatter, and lists any manifest skill NOT named here under an 'Uncategorized' section so newly synced skills surface loudly. When a source adds a skill, file its id into the right group below.

groups.title: Ecosystem research & routing
groups.description: Stellar-ecosystem analyst skills — survey/map a sector, profile a project, digest recent activity, position an SCF idea, audit content, find an integration, or scout prior art. The richest playbooks in the catalog: multi-step gather routines an LLM runs via `execute` over the lumenloop and scout adapters.

groups.title: LumenLoop REST API integration
groups.description: Partner-tier playbooks for calling the LumenLoop REST API directly (auth, the response envelope, the 18 read tools, metered research, billing, keys). Mirrors the contract the codemode server's lumenloop adapter enforces — read them to understand the envelope and deny-list before authoring `execute` code (deep dive: research/services/lumenloop.md).

groups.title: Soroban & smart contracts
groups.description: Writing, securing, and upgrading Stellar smart contracts (SDF smart-contracts skill — formerly branded Soroban — + OpenZeppelin's Stellar contract skills). Execution micro-skill candidates for any contract-aware gather path.

groups.title: Stellar app dev & data
groups.description: SDF's developer skills for building on Stellar off-chain: dapps/wallets, chain data via RPC/Horizon, classic assets + SAC, agentic payments, SEP/standards, and ZK. Reference + selective execution micro-skill candidates.
